title: FD + NTP Knife Compat
description: Fixes the issue with plant fiber not dropping when using the knife from NoTreePunching if it's in the same modpack as Farmer's Delight.
body:
## FD Plus NTP Knife Compat
Fixes a compatibility issue between Farmer's Delight and No Tree Punching that prevents plant fiber from dropping when breaking tall grass with NTP knives.

## The Problem
When using No Tree Punching alongside Farmer's Delight, the NTP knives don't drop plant fiber from tall grass and large ferns. This happens because Farmer's Delight modifies grass loot tables, overriding NTP's drops.

## The Solution
This mod injects plant fiber drops back into tall grass and large fern loot tables when using NTP knives, restoring the intended functionality.

## Dependencies

- Fabric API
- No Tree Punching

## Notes

- Compatible with Farmer's Delight (fixes the conflict)
- Works on both client and server
- Lightweight - only modifies loot tables
